title: Senior Category Manager - IT / Technology (m/w/d)
required_skills: Understanding of procurement processes and market dynamics
Project leadership from requirement definition to contract award
Analytical thinking and structured work style
bonus_skills: Interest in technology, infrastructure, and IT services
AI literacy and digital procurement tools
matched_skills: Vendor and partner management — IPC Marketing: managed vendors and partners for 4 product launches
Stakeholder coordination — cross-functional stakeholder management at HSBC and Hapag-Lloyd
Analytical and structured work style — market analysis and competitive intelligence at ECE Group
B2B negotiation context — IPC Marketing B2B GTM with 4.6M CNY contracts
Project coordination — managing concurrent initiatives with scope/timeline oversight at HSBC
missing_skills: IT procurement expertise (Technical Infrastructure, IT, Payment categories)
Sourcing strategy and supplier benchmarking methodology
German language at required operational fluency level (B1 only)
Contract negotiation and tender management experience
ERP/procurement system knowledge (SAP Ariba, Coupa, etc.)
core_responsibilities: Plan, lead, and execute group-wide procurement projects from requirement definition to contract award
Develop and implement sourcing strategies for individual projects and assigned categories
Continuously monitor and analyze relevant procurement markets, technologies, and cost models
Conduct internal and external benchmarks within assigned IT categories
Identify group-wide cost reduction, optimization, and synergy potentials
Manage existing supplier relationships and develop new/alternative suppliers
recommended_emphasis: IPC Marketing vendor/partner management for product launches as supplier management experience
ECE Group market analysis and competitive analysis as procurement market intelligence
B2B contract management context (4.6M CNY contracts) as negotiation evidence
HSBC budget governance (USD 8M) as financial oversight capability
summary: Scoring 26.7, this is a poor match. The Senior Category Manager IT role at ProSiebenSat.1 is a dedicated procurement position requiring IT purchasing expertise, sourcing strategy experience, and strong German proficiency — none of which are core to Boru's PMO governance and marketing background. While vendor management and B2B contract experience exist in the CV, they are not at the depth required for category management. Application is not recommended without relevant procurement experience.
